title: verbascum iconium
intro: Verbascum iconium, also known as Giant Mullein, is a flowering plant in the figwort family that is native to eastern Europe and Asia. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of this plant have been used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Verbascum iconium include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, while the flowers can be used to create salves and ointments for topical application.
